title: CUBED Vertical Slabs +
description:
If it exists, it has a slab!

-Official mod for the cubed texture pack.
body:
**This mod is intended to be used with the CUBED texture pack. It's compatible with vanilla and most  texture packs, but if you have missing textures (rose and black) it means it's a block from cubed.**

 

 

## This mod adds fully functional vertical slabs for most of minecraft building blocks.

 

### Features:
#### -180 working vertical slabs
#### -The hitboxes work like you'd expect them to.
#### -Works with shaders. *(known issue with transparent blocks and shaders, I believe it's a shader sided issue that can be resolved by modifying the shaders. I'll work on this in future versions)*
#### -Survival friendly. 

 ---

### Supported version : 1.14.4

 

In future versions I'd like to add stairs, slabs and inner/outer corners for every blocks that  has a vertical slab.

 

 

If you have requests/issues, send them to my discord: @1watermelon

or at https://github.com/WaterMelonVTL/Vertical-SLabs-Plus/
